title: 3 Best Software Stocks to Buy in 2023 and Beyond
text: Software companies have sticky products that are required to operate in many industries. Their margins are usually higher than companies with physical products.

title: 3 Metaverse Stocks to Transport You to a Future of Riches
text: sThe economy has gone through its fair share of ebb and flow throughout the past year. Concerns are mounting that the economic consequences of the Federal Reserve's tight monetary policies might intensify in 2024.

title: Autodesk: Opportunities For Growth
text: Autodesk's broad technology moat with CAD software leaves it well-poised for growth in market share. The company has upcoming AI opportunities that are set to further drive innovation and growth. Even though valuation remains relatively high, ADSK's market dominance and future potential justify the premium price.

title: How to (Actually) Get Rich With AI Investing
text: Last quarter, I revealed MarketMasterAI , a machine-learning algorithm designed to beat the stock market. Its backtests were successful: $10,000 invested in A+ rated stocks in 2010 would have theoretically grown to over $50,000 today, a full third better than the market average.
